name: Beans Rice
recipeIngredient: 10 oz package frozen whole kernel corn
1 cup raw white rice (or brown rice that has been partially boiled)
16 oz jar thick and chunky mild salsa
1 1/2 cups V8 (or a mixture of 3/4 cup canned diced tomatoes with green chiles and 3/4 cup water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the casserole has thickened slightly.
6. Serve with tortillas, fat-free sour cream, and/or reduced-fat cheddar cheese. Serves four.
